description: NFR-001 specifies: 'Keyboard activation (Space/Enter) is handled explicitly via onkeydown.' The test file FeedRow.dom.vitest.ts contains only negative tests (lines 862-943: 'keydown Space on CodeMirror does not exit edit mode', 'keydown Enter on CodeMirror does not exit edit mode') that verify Space/Enter within CodeMirror does NOT trigger the parent button during edit mode. There is NO positive test verifying that pressing Space or Enter on the div[role='button'] (when NOT in edit mode) correctly triggers handleRowClick / enterEditMode. This leaves the positive keyboard-activation path untested.

evidence.snippet: describe('note-body-editor: keyboard events in inline editor do not activate parent button', () => { ... })

additionalEvidence.description: PROP-FEED-013b tests CLICK to enter edit mode, but no parallel test for keyboard Space/Enter activation

remediationHint: Add a test that mounts FeedRow with editingStatus='idle', focuses the div[role='button'] (or dispatches keydown event with key=' ' on the element), and asserts that inline-codemirror-editor appears in the DOM. Add a parallel test for key='Enter'.
